'''''Star Wars Manga: The Empire Strikes Back'' 4''' is the fourth volume in the Empire Strikes Back manga series. It was illustrated by [[Toshiki Kudo]] and [[David Land]] and was based upon the original story by George Lucas.

[[File:SWManga_TESB4.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Cover art.]]
